text: Trump reposts: Trump doesn’t need a deal to get what he wants from Iran. Very true!!! President DJT
text_zh: 特朗普转发：特朗普不需要达成协议就能从伊朗那里得到他想要的东西。非常正确！！！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇸🇦 Saudi Envoy Prince Yazid bin farhan has arrived at Beirut and is currently at a meeting in Ain Al Tineh with Lebanese speaker of parliament. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇸🇦 Lebanese speaker of parliament Nabih Berri following his meeting with the Saudi prince: We thank Saudi Arabia for its efforts to assist Lebanon on various levels, especially those related to stopping the israeli aggression that targets Lebanon, its security, sovereignty, and stability. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇸🇦 沙特特使亚齐德·本·法尔汉亲王已抵达贝鲁特，目前正在艾因蒂内与黎巴嫩议会议长会面。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇸🇦 黎巴嫩议会议长纳比·贝里在与沙特亲王会面后表示：我们感谢沙特阿拉伯在各个层面为援助黎巴嫩所做的努力，特别是那些旨在制止针对黎巴嫩及其安全、主权和稳定的以色列侵略的努力。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇱🇧 French President Emmanuel Macron on Lebanon: We support extending the ceasefire in Lebanon and call for a lasting peace that respects Lebanon’s unity and sovereignty. France will organize a conference to support Lebanon and help rebuild southern Lebanon @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇱🇧 法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙谈黎巴嫩：我们支持延长黎巴嫩停火协议，并呼吁实现尊重黎巴嫩统一和主权的持久和平。法国将组织一次会议，以支持黎巴嫩并帮助重建黎巴嫩南部。@wfwitness

text: Former Republican U.S. House candidate Valentina Gomez calls Pakistan a “dirty shithole full of terrorists.”
text_zh: 前共和党美国众议院候选人瓦伦蒂娜·戈麦斯称巴基斯坦是一个“充满恐怖分子的肮脏粪坑”。

text: Open Source Intel TRUMP: No ship can enter or leave without the approval of the United States Navy. It is "Sealed up Tight," until such time as Iran is able to make a DEAL!!! Trump: “Iran is having a very hard time figuring out who their leader is! They just don't know! The infighting is between the "Hardliners," who have been losing BADLY on the battlefield, and the "Moderates," who are not very moderate at all (but gaining respect!), is CRAZY! We have total control over the Strait of Hormuz. No ship can enter or leave without the approval of the United States Navy. It is "Sealed up Tight," until such time as Iran is able to make a DEAL!!! Thank you for your attention to this matter. President DONALD J. TRUMP” - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）特朗普：没有美国海军的批准，任何船只都不得进出。它被“封锁得严严实实”，直到伊朗能够达成协议！！！特朗普：“伊朗很难弄清楚谁是他们的领导人！他们根本不知道！‘强硬派’（在战场上惨败）和‘温和派’（其实一点也不温和，但正在赢得尊重！）之间的内斗简直疯了！我们完全控制了霍尔木兹海峡。没有美国海军的批准，任何船只都不得进出。它被‘封锁得严严实实’，直到伊朗能够达成协议！！！感谢您对此事的关注。唐纳德·J·特朗普总统” - 开源情报推文

text: OSINTdefender President Donald J. Trump has posted to his Truth Social account stating that he has ordered the U.S. Navy to "shoot and kill any boat" laying mines in the Strait of Hormuz without hesitation. He goes on to say that minesweepers are actively clearing the Strait right now and that he's ordered that activity to triple. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 唐纳德·J·特朗普总统在“真实社交”（Truth Social）账户上发文称，他已下令美国海军毫不犹豫地“射杀任何”在霍尔木兹海峡布雷的船只。他接着说，扫雷舰目前正在积极清理海峡，他已下令将该行动增加三倍。 - 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Ukraine's Unmanned Systems Forces employing new B-2 middle-range OWA-UAVs for strikes against Russian air defense assets in Russia-occupied parts of Ukraine. Among the targets: two Tor-M2 and one Osa-AKM short-range air defense systems. According to the commander of the Ukrainian Unmanned Systems Forces, Robert "Madyar" Brovdi, the B-2 OWA-UAV is domestically produced in Ukraine and possesses a 7-11kg warhead. /2250 tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）乌克兰无人系统部队正在使用新型B-2中程单向攻击无人机（OWA-UAV）打击俄罗斯在乌克兰被占领土上的防空资产。目标包括：两套道尔-M2和一套黄蜂-AKM近程防空系统。据乌克兰无人系统部队指挥官罗伯特·“马迪亚尔”·布罗夫迪称，B-2单向攻击无人机由乌克兰国内生产，拥有7-11公斤的弹头。/2250 推文

text: WarTranslated Robert Brovdi, Commander of the SBS, reported that the "Birds" of the SBS destroyed an FSB command post in occupied Donetsk. On the morning of April 22, Ukrainian drones delivered 8 precision strikes using FP-2 assets. According to intelligence reports, 12 Russian officers were eliminated and 15 others were wounded. /1680956281/2249 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 无人系统部队指挥官罗伯特·布罗夫迪报告称，无人系统部队的“鸟儿”摧毁了被占领的顿涅茨克的一个联邦安全局（FSB）指挥所。4月22日上午，乌克兰无人机使用FP-2资产进行了8次精确打击。据情报报告，12名俄罗斯军官被消灭，另有15人受伤。/1680956281/2249 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: “I have ordered the United States Navy to shoot and kill any boat, small boats though they may be (Their naval ships are ALL, 159 of them, at the bottom of the sea!), that is putting mines in the waters of the Strait of Hormuz. There is to be no hesitation. Additionally, our mine "sweepers" are clearing the Strait right now. I am hereby ordering that activity to continue, but at a tripled up level! Thank you for your attention to this matter. President DONALD J. TRUMP” BREAKING 🔴 Trump: Ordered the Navy to shoot any boat placing mines in Hormuz. Trump: Our mine sweepers are clearing the strait right now. Trump: Ordered Hormuz mine sweepers to operate at a tripled level. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047296676642058506/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）特朗普：“我已下令美国海军射杀任何布雷的船只，哪怕是小船（他们的海军舰艇全部，159艘，都在海底了！）。不得有任何犹豫。此外，我们的扫雷舰目前正在清理海峡。我在此下令该活动继续进行，但要增加到三倍！感谢您对此事的关注。唐纳德·J·特朗普总统” 快讯 🔴 特朗普：下令海军射杀任何在霍尔木兹海峡布雷的船只。特朗普：我们的扫雷舰目前正在清理海峡。特朗普：下令霍尔木兹扫雷舰以三倍力度作业。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047296676642058506/photo/1 - 开源情报推文

text: Hezbullah issued statements confirming three operations 1. Targeting a gathering of Israeli soldiers in the town of Al-Taybeh with appropriate weapons. 2. Targeting another gathering of Israeli soldiers in the town of Al-Taybeh with an FPV drone. 3. Downing a surveillance quadcopter in the town of Majd Al-Zoun. @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: 真主党发表声明确认了三项行动：1. 使用适当武器袭击了泰贝镇的以色列士兵集结地。2. 使用FPV无人机袭击了泰贝镇的另一个以色列士兵集结地。3. 在马吉德·祖恩镇击落了一架监视四轴飞行器。@Middle_East_Spectator

text: Killing Iranian soldiers in boat has to be a grave ceasefire violation yes?

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Al-Arabiya: Pakistan is proposing that Iran open the Strait of Hormuz in exchange for the U.S. partially lifting the naval blockade. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 阿拉伯电视台：巴基斯坦提议伊朗开放霍尔木兹海峡，以换取美国部分解除海军封锁。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇸🇾 The Israeli Mine Clearance Authority has detonated more than 700 mines in the area near Kibbutz Ein Zivan, adjacent to the Syrian border in the Golan Heights. The mines were remnants of past conflicts, including the 1973 Yom Kippur War, when Syrian and Israeli forces laid extensive minefields along the front lines. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇸🇾 以色列排雷管理局在戈兰高地叙利亚边境附近的艾因齐万基布兹附近地区引爆了700多枚地雷。这些地雷是过去冲突的遗留物，包括1973年赎罪日战争，当时叙利亚和以色列军队在前线沿线埋设了大量雷区。@wfwitness

text: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 President Trump on Truth Social: ‘I have ordered the United States Navy to shoot and kill any boat, small boats though they may be (Their naval ships are ALL, 159 of them, at the bottom of the sea!), that is putting mines in the waters of the Strait of Hormuz. There is to be no hesitation. Additionally, our mine "sweepers" are clearing the Strait right now. I am hereby ordering that activity to continue, but at a tripled up level! Thank you for your attention to this matter.’ @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — ❗️ 🇺🇸 / 🇮🇷 特朗普总统在“真实社交”上表示：“我已下令美国海军射杀任何布雷的船只，哪怕是小船（他们的海军舰艇全部，159艘，都在海底了！）。不得有任何犹豫。此外，我们的扫雷舰目前正在清理海峡。我在此下令该活动继续进行，但要增加到三倍！感谢您对此事的关注。” @Middle_East_Spectator

text: Trump: Iran is having a very hard time figuring out who their leader is! They just don’t know! The infighting is between the “Hardliners,” who have been losing BADLY on the battlefield, and the “Moderates,” who are not very moderate at all (but gaining respect!), is CRAZY! We have total control over the Strait of Hormuz. No ship can enter or leave without the approval of the United States Navy. It is “Sealed up Tight,” until such time as Iran is able to make a DEAL!!! Thank you for your attention to this matter.
text_zh: 特朗普：伊朗很难弄清楚谁是他们的领导人！他们根本不知道！“强硬派”（在战场上惨败）和“温和派”（其实一点也不温和，但正在赢得尊重！）之间的内斗简直疯了！我们完全控制了霍尔木兹海峡。没有美国海军的批准，任何船只都不得进出。它被“封锁得严严实实”，直到伊朗能够达成协议！！！感谢您对此事的关注。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump said Iran is having a very hard time figuring out who its leader is, with infighting between hardliners and moderates. He claimed the U.S. has total control over the Strait of Hormuz: “No ship can enter or leave without the approval of the United States Navy. It is ‘Sealed up Tight’ until such time as Iran is able to make a DEAL!!!” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普表示，伊朗很难弄清楚谁是其领导人，强硬派和温和派之间存在内斗。他声称美国对霍尔木兹海峡拥有完全控制权：“在伊朗能够达成协议之前，没有船只可以在未经美国海军批准的情况下进出。它被‘严密封锁’了！！！” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to Mannie's War Room: "IDF troops captured a member of Hezbollah's elite Radwan Force in southern Lebanon yesterday, the military says.According to the IDF, troops spotted the Radwan operative who was planning to carry out "imminent" attacks on Israeli forces stationed in southern Lebanon." This is possibly in the injured fighter from the town where the IDF threatened to bomb the red cross ambulance
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Mannie's War Room：“据军方称，以色列国防军部队昨天在黎巴嫩南部俘获了一名真主党精锐拉德万部队的成员。据以色列国防军称，部队发现了这名拉德万武装人员，他正计划对驻扎在黎巴嫩南部的以色列军队发动‘迫在眉睫’的袭击。”这可能就是那个受伤的武装人员，来自以色列国防军威胁要轰炸红十字救护车的城镇。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran International : Internal disputes within Iran’s leadership prevented a negotiating team from travelling to Islamabad for talks with the United States, the opposition network has reported. According to sources, the delegation was ready to leave when a message from Iranian Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei’s inner circle ruled out discussing nuclear issues and reprimanded the foreign ministry team over earlier negotiations. Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi warned that under such constraints, attending the talks would serve no purpose and would doom any chance of progress. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran International：据该反对派网络报道，伊朗领导层内部的纠纷阻止了一个谈判小组前往伊斯兰堡与美国进行会谈。据消息人士称，代表团原定出发，但伊朗最高领袖莫杰塔巴·哈梅内伊核心圈子传出消息，排除了讨论核问题的可能性，并就早先的谈判斥责了外交部团队。伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希警告说，在这种限制下，参加会谈毫无意义，只会断送任何取得进展的机会。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Former Israeli prime minister Naftali Bennett has issued a political manifesto declaring that the Netanyahu‑Deri‑Smotrich coalition does not represent the true right, but rather “anarchy” and the dismantling of Israel. He accused the coalition of encouraging mass draft evasion, a culture of welfare dependency, attacks on IDF commanders, loss of governance in the Negev to Bedouin crime, and harbouring aides who took money from Qatar during the war against Hamas. Bennett called for a “Liberal Zionist Right” based on personal responsibility, universal military service, law and order, national loyalty, conservative reform, sovereignty, and preventing a Palestinian state. He said the coalition has “hijacked” the term “right wing” and that the public will soon replace it with his vision at the ballot box. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 以色列前总理纳夫塔利·贝内特发表了一份政治宣言，宣称内塔尼亚胡-德里-斯莫特里奇联盟并不代表真正的右翼，而是代表“无政府状态”和以色列的瓦解。他指责该联盟鼓励大规模逃避兵役、福利依赖文化、攻击以色列国防军指挥官、在内盖夫地区对贝都因犯罪失去治理，并窝藏在对哈马斯的战争期间从卡塔尔拿钱的助手。贝内特呼吁建立一个基于个人责任、全民兵役、法律与秩序、国家忠诚、保守派改革、主权和防止巴勒斯坦建国的“自由犹太复国主义右翼”。他说，该联盟“劫持”了“右翼”一词，公众很快会在投票箱前用他的愿景取代它。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah has released a second statement: “In response to the Israeli ceasefire violation and attacks on civilians in Tairi, we targeted a gathering of Israeli soldiers in Taybeh at 10:00 using an explosive drone.” @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah has released a statement: “In response to the Israeli ceasefire violations and breaches of Lebanese airspace, we shot down an Israeli reconnaissance drone at 10:30 in Majdal Zun.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 真主党发表了第二份声明：‘为了回应以色列违反停火协议并袭击泰里平民的行为，我们在10:00使用自杀式无人机袭击了泰贝的一群以色列士兵。’ @wfwitness” ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党发表声明：“为了回应以色列违反停火协议和侵犯黎巴嫩领空的行为，我们在10:30在马杰达尔祖恩击落了一架以色列侦察无人机。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 ☀️ Since the US‑Iran ceasefire on 8 April, at least 12 drone and missile strikes have hit Iranian Kurdish opposition camps in Iraq’s Kurdistan Region, killing at least four fighters and wounding seven. Targets include KDPI, Komala Toilers, PAK, and Komala Party. PAK is seen as the most exposed, having publicly offered to serve as Israel’s “boots on the ground." KDPI and Komala factions may be pushed into exile. Iran appears to be making the Kurdistan Region untenable for these groups, potentially forcing their relocation to a third country. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 ☀️ 自4月8日美伊停火以来，至少有12次无人机和导弹袭击击中了伊拉克库尔德斯坦地区的伊朗库尔德反对派营地，造成至少四名武装人员死亡，七人受伤。目标包括伊朗库尔德斯坦民主党（KDPI）、科马拉劳动者党（Komala Toilers）、库尔德斯坦自由党（PAK）和科马拉党。PAK被认为是最暴露的目标，因为它曾公开提出充当以色列的“地面部队”。KDPI和科马拉派系可能会被迫流亡。伊朗似乎正在使库尔德斯坦地区对这些组织来说变得无法生存，可能迫使他们迁往第三国。 @wfwitness

text: 📝 Наблюдаем рекорды 📝 « Российский Palantir» наращивает прибыль Не так давно мы рассказывали про отечественную компанию по распознаванию лиц NtechLab , чьи разработки в области искусственного интеллекта помогают следить за мигрантами в Санкт-Петербурге и встраиваются в городскую инфраструктуру по всей стране. Теперь компания подтвердила: интерес к этой отрасли значительно вырос и приносит деньги. ➡️ По итогам 2025 года выручка NtechLab достигла 2 млрд рублей при EBITDA 543 млн рублей. Рост — 30% к предыдущему году, когда выручка составляла 1,7 млрд рублей. Для сравнения: семь лет назад компания зарабатывала в 18 раз меньше. 🖍 Бизнес держится на трёх опорах: 40% — государственные контракты, 25% — корпоративные клиенты в России, 35% — международные заказчики. Доля компании на рынке видеоаналитики Москвы достигла 33%. 🚩 Системы NtechLab сегодня охватывают 77 регионов России и 37 стран мира . В 2025 году технологии впервые развернули в Кабардино-Балкарии, Калмыкии, Адыгее и ещё четырёх регионах. Параллельно — новые экспортные соглашения с Алжиром, ЮАР и Таиландом. 🏳️ Председатель совета директоров компании Василий Бровко назвал итоги 2025 года подтверждением долгосрочной стратегии: «За несколько лет компания прошла путь от стартапа до одного из лидеров мирового рынка ИИ… Такой курс позволяет нам не только демонстрировать кратные темпы роста, но и формировать задел для конкурентоспособности российского ИИ на глобальном уровне в горизонте следующего десятилетия». ❓ Почему NtechLab — компания, за которой стоит следить не только в российском контексте? Потому что по своей архитектуре она занимает ту же нишу, что и американский Palantir, только специализированно в сфере видеонаблюдения. Там, где Palantir интегрирует разнородные базы данных для силовых структур и разведки, NtechLab делает то же самое, но через видеопоток: алгоритм в базе из миллиарда изображений находит человека за 10 секунд, строит связи между объектами, адресами и контактами — без участия оператора. ❗️ В сегменте «умный город» и «безопасный город» — со ставкой на Глобальный Юг — NtechLab уже реальный конкурент западным вендорам: санкции закрыли европейский и американский рынки, но открыли огромное пространство из стран, которые хотят цифровой контроль «под ключ», не привязанный к западной политической повестке. 37 стран и рост выручки на 30% при действующих санкциях — вполне себе красноречивый сигнал о том, что российская ИИ-отрасль способна строить собственную глобальную инфраструктуру параллельно западной. #ИИ #технологии #Россия ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ ОК | ✉ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 观察记录 📝 “俄罗斯的Palantir”利润增长。不久前，我们介绍了国内人脸识别公司NtechLab，其人工智能领域的开发成果有助于监控圣彼得堡的移民，并被整合到全国的城市基础设施中。现在该公司证实：对该行业的兴趣显著增加并带来了收益。 ➡️ 2025年全年，NtechLab的收入达到20亿卢布，EBITDA为5.43亿卢布。比上一年增长了30%，当时收入为17亿卢布。相比之下：七年前，该公司的收入是现在的18分之一。 🖍 业务建立在三大支柱上：40%是政府合同，25%是俄罗斯的企业客户，35%是国际客户。该公司在莫斯科视频分析市场的份额达到了33%。 🚩 NtechLab系统目前覆盖俄罗斯77个地区和全球37个国家。2025年，该技术首次在卡巴尔达-巴尔卡尔、卡尔梅克、阿迪格和另外四个地区部署。同时，与阿尔及利亚、南非和泰国达成了新的出口协议。 🏳️ 公司董事会主席瓦西里·布罗夫科称2025年的结果是对长期战略的证实：“几年来，公司从一家初创企业成长为全球人工智能市场的领导者之一……这一方针不仅使我们能够展示成倍的增长速度，而且还为俄罗斯人工智能在未来十年在全球层面的竞争力奠定了基础。” ❓ 为什么NtechLab是一家不仅在俄罗斯背景下值得关注的公司？因为从架构上讲，它占据了与美国Palantir相同的利基市场，只是专门从事视频监控领域。Palantir为安全部队和情报部门整合不同的数据库，而NtechLab通过视频流做同样的事情：算法在十亿张图像的数据库中在10秒内找到一个人，建立对象、地址和联系人之间的联系——无需操作员参与。 ❗️ 在“智慧城市”和“安全城市”领域——押注全球南方——NtechLab已经是西方供应商的真正竞争对手：制裁关闭了欧美市场，但打开了巨大的空间，这些国家想要“交钥匙”的数字控制，而不受西方政治议程的束缚。37个国家和在现有制裁下30%的收入增长，是一个非常明显的信号，表明俄罗斯人工智能行业有能力在西方之外建立自己的全球基础设施。 #人工智能 #技术 #俄罗斯 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ OK | ✉ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 🇫🇷 🇮🇱 The Lebanese Cabinet session has begun and is being chaired by both presidents hours before negotiations between Lebanon and Israel in Washington. The cabinet started with a minute of silence in mourning for the martyrs, especially journalists among them and UNIFIL soldiers that have fallen. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 🇫🇷 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩内阁会议已经开始，由两位总统共同主持，距离黎巴嫩和以色列在华盛顿的谈判还有几个小时。内阁会议以默哀一分钟开始，悼念烈士，特别是其中的记者和牺牲的联合国驻黎巴嫩临时部队（联黎部队）士兵。 @wfwitness

text: 🇪🇺 🇺🇦 😁 The European Union expects Ukraine to repay the loan granted to it in the amount of €90 billion with "reparations from Russia", an official statement from the EU says 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇪🇺 🇺🇦 😁 欧盟官方声明称，欧盟预计乌克兰将用“俄罗斯的赔款”偿还向其提供的900亿欧元贷款 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump has ordered the US Navy to “shoot and kill any boat” that is laying mines in the Strait of Hormuz, with no hesitation. He also ordered mine‑sweeping operations to continue at triple the current level. Trump added that all 159…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump reposted a comment by X user with the name Marc Thiessen stating: “If there are two factions in Iran, one that wants a deal and one that doesn’t, let’s kill the ones who don’t want a deal.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普已下令美国海军“射杀任何”在霍尔木兹海峡布雷的船只，不得有任何犹豫。他还下令扫雷行动以当前三倍的水平继续进行。特朗普补充说，所有159艘……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普转发了X用户Marc Thiessen的一条评论，称：“如果伊朗存在两个派系，一个想要达成协议，另一个不想，那就干掉那些不想达成协议的人。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah has released a statement: “In response to the Israeli ceasefire violation and attacks on civilians in Tairi, we targeted a gathering of Israeli soldiers in Taybeh at 06:00 using appropriate weapons.” @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah has released a second statement: “In response to the Israeli ceasefire violation and attacks on civilians in Tairi, we targeted a gathering of Israeli soldiers in Taybeh at 10:00 using an explosive drone.” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇱🇧 Reuters: France is sending nearly 10 tons of humanitarian aid to Lebanon, including tents, cooking kits and lamps, to support displaced populations. @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah has released a statement: “In response to the Israeli ceasefire violation and attacks on civilians in Tairi, we targeted a gathering of Israeli soldiers in Taybeh at 06:00 using appropriate weapons.” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷 The IRGC Navy announces the seizure of two vessels in the coast of Iran. MSC-FRANCESCA with alleged links to Israel, and EPAMINODES, were seized by the IRGC Navy and directed to the coast of Iran. IRGC Navy added that the ships violated maritime security…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Reuters: The two cargo ships seized by the IRGC Navy have been taken to the Port of Bandar Abbas. A one of the relatives of the seafarers reports that Iran is treating the crew well. "Some 20 Iranians armed to the teeth stormed the ship. Sailors are under Iranians' control, their movements on the ship are limited, but the Iranians are treating them well." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷 伊斯兰革命卫队海军宣布在伊朗海岸扣押了两艘船只。据称与以色列有关联的MSC-FRANCESCA号和EPAMINODES号被伊斯兰革命卫队海军扣押，并被引导至伊朗海岸。伊斯兰革命卫队海军补充说，这些船只违反了海上安全……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 路透社：被伊斯兰革命卫队海军扣押的两艘货船已被带往阿巴斯港。一名船员的亲属报告称，伊朗对船员待遇良好。“大约20名全副武装的伊朗人冲上了船。船员处于伊朗人的控制之下，他们在船上的活动受到限制，但伊朗人对他们很好。” @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇦 Ukrainians are afraid to call the police for fear that they or their loved ones will be mobilized, the head of the National Police Ivan Vygovsky admitted: “Society has been negatively disposed towards police officers lately. And it's understandable why: we are involved in the mobilization together with the TCC.” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 乌克兰人不敢报警，生怕自己或亲人被动员，国家警察局局长伊万·维戈夫斯基（Ivan Vygovsky）承认：“最近社会对警察持负面态度。原因显而易见：我们正与领土征兵中心（TCC）一起参与动员工作。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Al-Jadeed: Lebanon is expected to request an extension of the ceasefire in today’s Israel‑Lebanon meeting in Washington, while Israel is expected to ask for a higher level of representation in the negotiations. Unlike the previous session, today’s meeting is closed to the press. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Al-Jadeed电视台：预计黎巴嫩将在今天华盛顿举行的以黎会议上要求延长停火协议，而以色列预计将要求在谈判中提高代表级别。与之前的会议不同，今天的会议不对媒体开放。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇫🇷🇱🇧🇱🇧🇺🇳 French Minister of the Armed Forces Catherine Vautrin announced that Corporal Chief Anicet Girardin of the 132nd Cynotechnical Infantry Regiment has died of his wounds after being shot by Hezbollah fighters in southern Lebanon. He was serving with…" ⚡️ 🇺🇳 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇫🇷 UN Secretary-General António Guterres condemned the 18 April attack on a UNIFIL patrol in southern Lebanon in which peacekeepers came under fire from non‑state actors, presumed to be Hezbollah, while investigating suspected improvised explosive devices. Guterres called for all attacks on peacekeepers to stop, stating that such attacks are grave violations of international humanitarian law and Security Council Resolution 1701, and may amount to war crimes. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇫🇷🇱🇧🇱🇧🇺🇳 法国武装部队部长凯瑟琳·沃特兰（Catherine Vautrin）宣布，第132犬科步兵团的首席下士阿尼塞·吉拉丁（Anicet Girardin）在黎巴嫩南部被真主党武装人员射击后伤重不治。他当时正在服役……” ⚡️ 🇺🇳 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇫🇷 联合国秘书长古特雷斯谴责了4月18日对黎巴嫩南部联合国驻黎巴嫩临时部队（联黎部队）巡逻队的袭击，当时维和人员在调查疑似简易爆炸装置时遭到非国家行为体（推测为真主党）的开火。古特雷斯呼吁停止所有针对维和人员的袭击，称此类袭击严重违反国际人道法和安理会第1701号决议，并可能构成战争罪。 @wfwitness

text: Trump reposts some “advice” on Truth Social.
text_zh: 特朗普在“真实社交”（Truth Social）上转发了一些“建议”。

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Trump says that he ordered to shoot and kill any boat that's putting mines in the Strait of Hormuz 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 特朗普表示，他已下令射杀任何在霍尔木兹海峡布雷的船只 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
